│                        ││                                                    │
│    Ralph               ││ Help                                               │
│                        ││                                                    │
│ │ Dashboard            ││ Use the left menu to navigate and Ctrl+F to switch │
│ │ Overview of Ralph a… ││                                                    │
│                        ││                                                    │
│   Run Loop             ││                                                    │
│   Run loop controls    ││                                                    │
│                        ││                                                    │
│   Build Specs          ││                                                    │
│   Specs builder        ││                                                    │
│                        ││                                                    │
│   •••                  ││                                                    │
╰────────────────────────╯╰────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

ctrl+q quit        
ctrl+n toggle nav  
ctrl+f toggle focus
ctrl+h toggle help 
ctrl+l refresh now 
ctrl+k search      
enter  open
